programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help a Yankee family learn to do business in the South if he hopes to save the poorly themed Characters Quarters in North Carolina.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The Tradewinds bar could shut down for good if Jon can't get a lazy stepson to step into his new role as manager.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When an old-school Memphis, TN, cigar shop owner opens an adjacent cocktail bar and hires his son as manager, the bar quickly becomes an afterthought.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An inexperienced bar owner calls on Jon after hiring a hard-partying manager with no industry knowledge to run Broadway Club in Tooele, Utah.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A juvenile name and bad reputation threaten the Fort Bragg-adjacent bar Cliques, and Jon will have to put the staff through bar boot camp to save it.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon steps in to help two brothers whose ill-conceived idea for a death-metal concert bar has drained their parents' retirement fund.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The hippie-dippie owner of a Chicago music venue is more concerned with the spirit of wonderment than appealing to her trendy community, so Jon introduces some tough love.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A raccoon infestation is only the most extreme on a long list of problems plaguing KC's Bar & Grill and its checked-out owner.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon arrives in the nick of time to save Sidelines, a family-operated sports bar being run into the ground by a violent father.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to San Antonio to help a "cool mom" owner stop partying and start running her business like a professional.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After convincing his friends to invest their life savings, the rookie bar owner of Cirivello's has turned a community staple into a money pit and now faces a hostile takeover.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon schools the clueless owner of Grinders, whose unauthorized and unsafe renovation has the city threatening to shut the place down.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After suffering a stroke, the owner of Desi Romano's Sports Bar & Grill risks losing his family legacy if Jon can't help him bounce back.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get an overly-emotional bar owner to stop wallowing and take action to save his bar.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie, Lani, April, and Skylar are among the trainees competing for a few open slots as Baywatch Lifeguards. Hobie isn't sure he wants to follow in his father's footsteps, but when a vengeful jet skier comes after April, Hobie comes to her rescue.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Veteran lifeguard Jack 'JD' Darius has a dark secret in his past. He comes to Baywatch to throw his rescue can in the ring for the open Lieutenant slot, but young and ambitious Taylor Walsh also wants the job, and she's ready to fight for it.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch, Sky, and April find a dead man on the ocean floor. Their search for answers to his demise leads to the retirement home where he lived, and his two friends who seem to be hiding the true story. The chemistry between Cody and Lani heats up.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: April is devastated by her younger brother Charlie’s terminal illness. Mitch and Hobie want to make sure Charlie's wishes are granted, and that the time he spends with the lifeguards at Baywatch is the best of his life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline's acting career isn't going well so she returns to Baywatch to figure out what she really wants to do with her life. The lifeguards are plagued by a sleaze-ball helicopter reporter who somehow knows intimate details about their love lives.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After the devastation of the last big L.A. earthquake, Baywatch lifeguards are taking recent Seismic activity seriously. Caroline and JD 's tempestuous relationship heats up, forcing Caroline to make a critical decision that could change her life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The hot Santa Ana winds blow an air of mystery to Baywatch when two sea lions perish in an unexplainable event. Mitch must uncover the cause to stop it from happening again. April is courted by Manny and Hobie, forcing her to choose between them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Donna tries to help Neely overcome her addiction to painkillers. Craig Pomeroy shows up at Baywatch to defend the legal rights of an elderly Native American shaman determined to initiate his tribe's traditional death ritual on the Baywatch beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody ignores regulations and leaves his tower five minutes early to meet Lani for a hot date. Right after he leaves, a young woman goes swimming and is engulfed by a wave, never to reappear. Cody is tortured by the results of his negligence.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline's truck is hijacked by a young thief who forces her to drive him on a wild getaway chase. Neely reveals a shocking secret about her outrageous actions during her hiatus from Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Prejudice threatens Manny and April's relationship, driving April into Craig's comforting arms. An encounter with sharks leads Craig and April to take shelter in a water treatment plant's intake pipe where they encounter even more danger!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch learns that a cache of US Marine weapons has been stolen and probably hidden offshore. Mitch and Cody locate a sunken vessel with the arms on board, but before they can confiscate them, they are taken captive.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After breaking up with Manny, April finds romance with Craig, who is having a mid-life crisis. While working together to catch a trio of wild men on waverunners harassing swimmers, Craig and April's passion heats up.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch uses Hobie to initiate a relationship with Hobie's horseback riding instructor. Cody, JD, and Lani try to make extra cash in a scheme to collect Sea Urchins, but when another diver gets into trouble, Lani puts her life at risk to save him.

programme.title: Bellator 178: Straus vs Pitbull 4
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place from Mohegan Sun in Connecticut featuring a featherweight world title fight between Patricio Pitbull and Daniel Straus in the fourth chapter of their storied rivalry. Also, AJ McKee and Ilima-Lei Macfarlane return to action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to London with a stacked card featuring a showdown between top welterweights Paul “Semtex” Daley and Rory MacDonald, along with appearanc-es from Michael “MVP” Page, Cheick Kongo, Baby Slice and Liam McGeary.

programme.title: Bellator NYC: Sonnen vs Silva
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Madison Square Garden in NY with a blockbuster card. Chael Sonnen and Wanderlei Silva in a long-awaited grudge match. The double main event also sees Fedor Emelianenko taking on Matt Mitrione. Also, Douglas Lima and Michael Chandler!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is live with its biggest show ever from Madison Square Garden featuring new signee Ryan Bader taking on Champ Phil Davis for the Light Heavyweight belt. Irish phenom James Gallagher taking on KO artist Chinzo Machida.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place in Thackerville, Oklahoma with a rubber match between two veteran standouts as Brandon Girtz meets Derek Campos in a main event sure to produce fireworks! The stacked card also features fights with Joe Warren and Kendall Grove.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is from Verona, New York with a Middleweight showdown as Chidi Njokuani takes on former champ Andrey Koreshkov. Heavy-handed Brennan Ward will face off against Fernando Gonzalez in the co-main slot.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes home to San Jose, California with a collision between top lightweights as Patricky Pitbull meets Benson Henderson. Plus the Bellator debut of Roy “Big Country” Nelson when he faces hard-hitting Javy Ayala in a heavyweight battle.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville as Eduardo Dantas puts his Bantamweight world title on the line against Darrion Caldwell. This stacked fight card also features Daniel Straus taking on Emmanuel Sanchez and Pat Curran facing off against John Macapa.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The elite two-division threat, Gegard Mousasi makes his Bellator debut against former Middleweight Champion Alexander Shlemenko who is on a five-fight win streak.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Penn State as accomplished alumni Phil Davis and Ed Ruth return to their roots. Light Heavyweight Champ Ryan Bader defends his belt. Plus Ilima-Lei Macfarlane and Emily Ducote clash for the inaugural flyweight world title!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ben says his wife, Kelly gained a significant amount of weight, is no longer affectionate & stopped cleaning & cooking his favorite meals 6 mos after marrying. Kelly says Ben lost 100 lbs, then became a "narcissist" & a "jerk" Can this marriage be saved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What happens when a parent's agenda becomes so extreme that his or her children are forced to live a harsh, stoic existence?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Renee & Lee insist their little granddaughter is not safe in the care of her parents because they are severe alcoholics. Chris & Jessica admit to alcoholism yet insist they are great parents. Dr. Phil shows shocking footage of what home cameras captured.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil's guests say they endure abuse from their grown children. Debbie says daughter, Amy, 31, is verbally & physically abusive. Amy admits she can be cruel to her mom, but Debbie makes her feel like a failure. As tempers flare see who storms off!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Terrie says daughter Kelly accused her of molesting her 5-yr-old granddaughter. Terrie says Kelly attended a week-long desert retreat that affected her personality: Kelly says she saw aliens on the retreat who may have abducted, raped & impregnated her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kaye, 70, says she has sent over $200,000 to "Aaron," a man she met on the Internet & has been "dating" for over a year, but never met in person. Tensions flare when the women come face-to-face on Dr. Phil's stage. And who is "Aaron?" Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Nikki & Paige say mom Leigh is an alcoholic who has "gone missing" at least 40 times, abandoned them as teens in a foreclosed home without electricity or running water & is drunk around her grandchildren. Will Leigh listen and take Dr. Phil's help?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his interview with Heather & Brian, feuding parents over 15-yr-old son Brandon's death. Hear from Brandon's friends, the last to see him alive and two of the young men make shocking allegations against Heather. How does she respond?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: This 2004 YouTube viral video sent shock waves, racked up millions of views, and stirred online outrage. Texas Judge William Adams is lashing his then 16-year-old daughter with a belt, despite her pleas to stop. Do you think Adam's actions are justified?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Kourtney and Kelly who are trying to convince their mom, Karla, that she’s not Mrs. Tyler Perry, but an online scam victim, losing $100,000 of her retirement fund. Karla finds out shocking information about her online love. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Darbi, 16, now missing and not the first time. In 2015, Darbi ran away & became a victim of sex trafficking. Aunt Camille says she fears nothing will happen to save Darbi's life if parents, Janice and Wayne, don't end their feuding and come together. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lydia says she's living in her dream home with a view reminding her of Italy and of being in love. Daughter Kim calls it an overcrowded and messy mansion and is afraid she'll inherit the mess, plus her sister who lives in the basement! Dr. Phil mediates!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget is worried her brother-in-law Kevin, 38, is having an inappropriate relationship with her daughter, Grace,16. Red flags went up when Grace told her that Kevin put whipped cream on his neck & asked her to lick it off. Kevin denies it all. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Last year, Judy says her husband of 30 years, Danny, suffered a mid-life crisis, had an affair and filed for divorce -- but now he wants her back. What advice does Dr. Phil give the couple?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Crystal who accuses her ex-boyfriend of sexually assaulting their child. Crystal’s mom, Barbara, says Anthony is a “disgusting, lying, abusive narcissist” and he says Barbara is a “lowlife dirtbag”. Dr. Phil moderates. Part 2

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Shorty Kellms again short circuits fiancee Elverna's wedding plans, this time by marrying Mr. Drysdale's prettiest secretary.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts set up a miniature farm so Shorty's bride Gloria can sample farm life, and soon the exhausted girl is delighted to hear she's not really married.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies leave Shorty Kellems temporarily in charge of the Clampett mansion and he turns it into a hotel for single secretaries.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampett mansion is set up as a hotel for women, and banker Drysdale decides to extort a few dollars from his secretary guests.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies again meet "Honest John," the con man who had sold them half of Manhattan and then returned their journey.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed prepares to underwrite con man Honest John's scheme to drill a channel in the mountains to draw off the smog in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies plan to go to Washington to give the President their $95,000,000 fortune to help fight air pollution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Romance enters Elly May's life in a big way when Navy Lt. Mark Templeton arrives at the Clampett mansion to pay a visit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny consults a psychiatrist to give "modern medicine" a chance to keep frogman Mark Templeton from turning into a real frog.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny battles to keep her family out of the swimming pool, convinced that if they get wet they'll turn into frogs.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny invites Shorty Kellems back from the hills to help break up Elly May's romance with Mark Templeton.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny thinks Shorty Kellems has turned into a seal because he ignored her warnings about swimming in the Clampett pool.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is finally convinced that Elly May's boyfriend, Mark Templeton, is a human being -- not half-frog as she first suspected.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale's downtrodden bank secretaries organize to fight for better wages and working conditions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Elly May join the Women's Liberation Movement and leave all the household chores to Jed and Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbilly ladies move out of the Clampett mansion but Jed and Jethro replace them with a trio of Japanese beauties.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbilly women, assured of their equal rights, return to the Clampett mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May gets a job at Mr. Drysdale's bank and moves into co-worker Jane Hathaway's apartment.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro leaves home when he learns his ugly childhood sweetheart is coming for a visit, not knowing she has become a beauty contest winner.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Dick Bremerkamp, a penniless actor, learns the Clampetts are millionaires and begins romancing Elly May.

programme.desc: Lamont may be in for a fight when he tries to change Fred's bigoted attitude toward other minorities. He finally leaves home after Fred refuses to allow a sensitivity group to meet at the Sanford home.

programme.title: Sanford and Son

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Greed gets in the way when a Japanese land development company offers to buy the Sanford house. Even though Lamont is delighted with the money, Fred thinks he can get much more and decides to pay the realtor a 'personal' visit at her home.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: When Fred buys a horse with an impressive racing history in order to breed him and make millions, he fails to notice that the broken-down animal has been gelded. He tries to cover up his mistake by covering up the horse's.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred is determined to avoid a visit by his niece Elizabeth, the 'spitting image' and namesake of his late wife. But once she arrives, Fred is completely taken by her and her life is completely overtaken by her suddenly protective uncle.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: When the Sanford's Puerto Rican neighbor Julio asks Fred for a favor, the prejudiced Fred immediately says 'no way.' But Fred's anti-Puerto Rican attitude suddenly changes after Julio's nephew is the victim of discrimination in school.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Billy Dee Williams makes a guest appearance in the Jefferson living room, but can't convince his 'number one fan' Florence that he is who he is.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George's attempts to make points with a local banker are frustrated by Allan's attempts to make points with the banker's daughter.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George agonizes over a decision that could change both his life and the life of someone very special. George's favorite cousin, Dusty, delights the Jeffersons with a surprise visit, but concerns them with some serious news.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Louise insists that she and George have fallen into a rut, until a turn of fate transforms their 'routine' into the good old days.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Harry Bentley is stuck with an insufferable lady houseguest and when George Jefferson volunteers to get him unstuck, he winds up sticking Bentley with something worse.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George's Christmas is merrier after Louise's intervention helps him find a father he never knew.

Lester wins a major contracting bid, which enables the Jenkins' to begin looking for their dream home when Lester discovers that the backers of the construction job are involved in South African investments.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Zach brokers a deal with Draya in exchange for a date, they flirt with the idea of starting a shop romance. Charmaine and Neek plan for their future together and share some news with their moms. Ryan opens up about some family issues in therapy.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Charmaine announces her pregnancy to the 2nd City crew and tries to appease her unhappy mother-in-law. Jess announces a pajama party at her house and gets a dose of the reality of Chicago life with Prince and Fly.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ryan moves up and moves on with a rumored fling visiting from out of town. Don's plan to help Phor and Ryan find love in the club goes left when Ashley crashes the party with her single friends. Zach's arrogance pushes Fly to his breaking point.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: After a fight between her artists, Charmaine starts to see the cracks in 2nd City Ink. Don helps Phor deal with a potential bombshell while the tension between Charmaine and Ryan comes to a head when one of her artists considers switching teams.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Phor meets his maybe-teenage-baby for the first time while Ryan realizes he is responsible for the broken relationships with the women around him. Charmaine is devastated by the news of her mother Glenda's passing.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: As Charmaine prepares for her mother's funeral, concerns grow for her Dad. The 2nd City crew and Ryan head to New Orleans for the burial but Don and Phor are not invited. Prince brokers a truce with his ex. Phor spends time with his alleged daughter.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: The gang turns up on Bourbon Street in the spirit of Glenda. Kitty considers Charmaine's job offer, but Jess is left in the dark. Don helps Phor get answers about his potential daughter while Prince makes a tough decision.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Kitty lands in Chicago with a splash, making waves with the 2nd City crew. Tensions reach a boiling point when Jess confronts Char about Kitty's role at 2nd City. Ashley finally takes her marital matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ashley reveals the real reason she left Don. Jess flies back to London. Fly drops off Prince at the courthouse to turn himself in. Charmaine finds out the gender of her baby. The Chicago Tribune article drops and Van pops up to talk to Charmaine.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: After an incriminating article puts 2nd City on blast, Charmaine and Kitty do damage control with their artists by burying the lede. As news travels quickly, the truth about the article threatens to ruin Charmaine's lavish NYC baby shower.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: The future of 2nd City is in jeopardy while Charmaine attempts to secure the proper documents to legalize the shop. Ryan is forced to make some decisions about his love life. 9MAG and Charmaine come face to face again after their falling out.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: When a romantic video of Ryan and Rachel vacationing in Mexico shows up on social media, a jilted Kitty bares her claws. Former Chicago Bull Eddy Curry gets a memorial tattoo. 2nd City Ink hosts an open call to expand the team.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Char's false alarm forces her into early maternity leave. Kitty's determined to prove to Char that she can handle the shop in her absence. Over at 9MAG, Draya and Phor forge on to keep the tattoo community unified while tensions at 2nd City rise.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Char struggles to find balance between the shop and maternity leave. Kitty's caught off guard by Jess' surprise to elevate things at 2nd City. At 9MAG, Ryan and Rachel finally come to terms with their relationship while Don seeks legal counsel.

programme.desc: Mark's good advice to Earvin about romance somehow causes Earvin to elope with his new girlfriend, and Earvin's mother wants Mark to stop the couple.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper
programme.desc: Mark tries to help Geneva's boyfriend become a part of his group of male friends with disastrous results. Nicole hides a stray cat in her room, but Vanessa is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS se sumerge en el competitivo mundo de los camiones de comida ambulante tras encontrar a un hombre congelado en la parte trasera de uno de ellos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre un círculo secreto de peleas de perros, lo cual lleva a un miembro del equipo a hacer un movimiento inesperado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Reinas de Manhattan
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una reina drag en un parque local. Erin reabre un caso de drogas tras ser secuestrada por la madre del acusado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Secretos abiertos
programme.desc: La investigación del secuestro de una joven trae recuerdos dolorosos a Danny, quien trabajó en un caso similar sin resolver hace años.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Palabras que hieren
programme.desc: Danny busca a una mujer que amenaza con suicidarse junto al responsable de la muerte de sus padres. Frank acompaña a su nieto en una excursión escolar y lucha por conectar.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Los derribamientos
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el ataque a una embarazada víctima de un juego de pandilleros que golpean a civiles al azar. Mientras, Frank duda en promover a un oficial por temor a ser visto como favoritismo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamado a Kansas para investigar una serie de asesinatos, una reunión tensa comienza entre Blake y su padre, un capitán de policía retirado, y su hermano, un detective, y deben trabajar juntos para ayudar a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC va a San José para investigar una serie de asesinatos, García profundiza en su pasado hacker y se reencuentra con su antiguo amor para ayudar al equipo con el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: NCIS investiga la muerte de un oficial de la armada quien fue asesinado mientras conducía a la casa de un recluso puesto en libertad recientemente.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Tras el descubrimiento del nombre de Sloane en un autobús abandonado en Afganistán y con el conductor muerto, Gibbs la acompaña para ayudarle a encontrar a un grupo de mujeres que han sido secuestradas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS se sumerge en el competitivo mundo de los camiones de comida ambulante tras encontrar a un hombre congelado en la parte trasera de uno de ellos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre un círculo secreto de peleas de perros, lo cual lleva a un miembro del equipo a hacer un movimiento inesperado.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/16/14. Anthony Bourdain travels to Jamaica, where he visits the home of James Bond author Ian Fleming and learns about music legend Bob Marley.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/11/2015. The alluring island of Okinawa is explored by Bourdain from historical, political, cultural and culinary perspectives.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/18/2015. Anthony Bourdain ventures to the Bay Area, where he tries Brazilian Jiu Jitsu, discovers healing through nourishment and enjoys soul food at Real Miss Ollie’s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/28/14. Anthony Bourdain explores Shanghai by savoring home-style cuisine and having meaningful conversations with locals about the culture and the booming economy.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/05/14. Anthony Bourdain explores the diverse cuisines and cultures The Bronx, New York, has to offer, by experiencing firsthand the music, food and art

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/12/14. Dive into Anthony Bourdain’s puzzling family history, as he takes a trip to Paraguay and experiences the rich culture and savory local dishes.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/19/14. Travel with Anthony Bourdain as he gives an inside look at the Dong Ba market, Vinh Moc tunnels, Duyen Anh’s restaurant and the Citadel.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/26/14. Anthony Bourdain visits Tanzania, where he enjoys the island’s famous food and comes face to face with lions and elephants while on an excursion.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/02/14. Anthony Bourdain explores Tehran and Isfahan, where he soaks up the beauty of the country and the complexity of its foods.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/09/14. Bourdain takes a trip to the haunts of his youth that marked the start of his culinary career, and he candidly discusses his descent into heroin addiction and recovery. He then heads to the western part of the state.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A biker with a history of stealing vehicles doesn’t know how to drive his motorcycle. A man in- between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man’s work van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered. An unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift. A friendly woman has a thing for cowboys.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend’s honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday. Police investigate a case of road rage involving a possible gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with multiple felony warrants gets one last taste of freedom before heading to prison. A speeding driver is arrested for the same thing he was arrested for the day before. A runaway suspect leaves a trail behind him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A very cooperative car thief tells deputies all about his good fortune. An argument over business leaves one man on the ground with a bloody mouth. The occupants of a truck are oblivious to what deputies find in the backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it’s better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man’s erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies catch up to a group of teenagers enjoying a night of joyriding. A traffic stop opens the doors to recovery for a very repentant suspect. A suspect insists his car is not stolen because he did his online research.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon’s true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other’s actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick take the case of a young man who is found naked in the desert without an obvious cause of death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine violates department protocol when she takes the case of a rape accusation against her ex-husband. Warrick and Sara search for the missing bullet that will either exonerate or indict a cop for murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a teenager and her sister are the sole survivors of the gruesome murder of four members of one family in a quiet suburban neighborhood, Grissom and his entire team investigate the crime.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Royce Harmon was murdered 3 months ago in a scene staged to look like a suicide. Now another murder has taken place. Whoever the killer is he has a thorough knowledge of forensics, he purposefully has left evidence, and has baffled Grissom and his team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the death of a first class passenger on a flight to Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate a bug riddled body found in the desert. Warrick and Catherine look into the theft of some valuable art.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a supermarket. In the store, Grissom finds a bathroom stall door that claims five women have been killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man about to go on trial for arson and the murder of his wife and child seeks assistance from Grissom to help prove his innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in an office building, killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a single human bone is discovered in the desert, Grissom and Catherine must cover miles of territory to find the rest of the skeleton.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: At a swanky fundraiser, attended by the sheriff, a woman turns up dead in the pool.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a mall parking garage. She's raped, beaten, shot and left for dead. Sara collects evidence from her and grows attached to her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el CSI va a la escena del crimen en un motel familiar, Nick comienza a relacionar tres asesinatos que se han cometido allí ese año.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Riley son tomados como rehenes después de un tiroteo en una comunidad normalmente tranquila de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un antiguo alumno de Ray es asesinado. La investigación les llevará hasta el mundo de la lucha libre mexicana.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El caso de Nick sobre un paracaidista herido dará un giro cuando Catherine descubra que está relacionado con un caso de doble asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy se encuentran en una convención de ciencia ficción de uno de sus programas de televisión favoritos, terminan investigando el asesinato de uno de sus queridos actores.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine revisa uno de los primeros casos en los que trabajó como CSI cuando el delincuente condenado por el asesinato afirma que el veredicto se basó en pruebas defectuosas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una enfermedad inexplicable que afecta a ciudadanos al azar de Las Vegas desconcierta a los CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un brutal asesinato por parte de una banda de motociclistas tiene lugar en un bar de motocicletas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un botín de fichas perdidas de un casino cerrado aparece en Las Vegas y le sigue una serie de asesinatos, lo que lleva a Langston a usar la fuerza letal por primera vez en su carrera como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Sara regresa inesperadamente, el equipo de CSI se une para investigar la muerte de una famosa joven actriz fallecida en un dudoso accidente de tránsito.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un productor de pornografía y un traficante de drogas son encontrados muertos en un área exclusiva de Las Vegas, el equipo de CSI centra su investigación en los miembros del vecindario.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando dos compañeros de oficina conspiran para robar un casino, su plan termina con los CSI investigando un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un policía mata a otro oficial, el CSI debe buscar las pruebas para determinar si el tiroteo fue premeditado o un accidente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo un equipo de fútbol universitario es investigado cuando su querido entrenador es encontrado asesinado en su casa.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton is trying to drive out of the hurricane's fury when he kills a man in the blinding storm and is now accused of vehicular manslaughter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A gas man is engulfed in invisible flames and dies all of which happens during a qualifying race at the Grand Prix Americas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finally closes the case of his brother's murder. He is reunited with Suzie, a former drug user who was involved with his brother.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a woman is witnessed being attacked by a shark, the CSIs learn that she was murdered prior to being dumped in the water.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young woman is thrown over the railing of a parking garage, the investigation into her death uncovers evidence that she was killed before the fall.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a plastic surgery anesthesiologist is found dead from an apparent suicide, Horatio thinks that this could be a case of murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A diamond broker is shot to death in a parking garage, a mentally disabled man witnessed the murder and wants to help Horatio solve the crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man, Juan Marco Varon, who may or may not have tortured Cuban refuges is murdered, the CSIs are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and his team delve into the world of celebrity and investigate the murder of a paparazzi. He discovers the victim witnessed another murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson is killed in his own home and his body is missing, while his wife and son are left alive, but beaten and bound.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In the Everglades, near a controlled burn, Alexx and Delko search the crime scene. They are forced to take cover when a wall of fire overtakes them.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio is quick to arrive on the scene when an armored truck carrying 3.2 million dollars is robbed in a daring downtown heist.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin literally becomes part of a murder crime scene after he steals a latex glove to add to his personal forensic collection.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A slippery journalist is the only witness to a murder, and Horatio suspects that he may be looking for a much bigger story.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Alexx se convierte en sospechoso de asesinato, salvarlo tiene terribles consecuencias. Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben actuar para absolverlo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre muere debido a una llamada falsa a Emergencias, Horatio debe enfrentarse a un investigador privado que está destruyendo sistemáticamente al equipo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando alguien está decidido a destruir a Horatio y al equipo de CSI, Horatio arriesga su vida para salvar a su personal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI no se detendrá ante nada para encontrar a quién le disparó a Horatio, la evidencia los lleva a algunas de las personas más peligrosas de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: The girls go to Bocchi's house to make T-shits.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una mordidita
programme.desc: En la escena de un crimen, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato, varios pelos extraños y huellas dactilares desconocidas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, una agencia federal dictaminó que Terri Strickland había provocado intencionalmente el fuego que mató a su hijo de 17 meses, Josh Hinson.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de un día de pesca en un tranquilo pueblo de Suiza, un adolescente no regresa a casa como se planeó. La investigación revela algunas evidencias microscópicas importantes en el agua cerca de donde fue visto por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mundo es un escenario
programme.desc: La policía es enviada a la escena de un tiroteo y descubren que el esposo de la víctima es uno de los suyos: un detective de homicidios que dice que su esposa se disparó accidentalmente en la cabeza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Marcado de por vida
programme.desc: Un hombre que había cometido delitos, incluido el asesinato, no fue capturado. Casi 50 años después, los avances en la tecnología y el análisis de la escritura descubrieron al criminal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es encontrada muerta en su departamento.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ocurre un accidente y los responsables se dan a la fuga, causando la muerte de un joven muy popular. Los investigadores se ven enfrentados con la tarea de buscar un barco entre otros 1200.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, se descubrió el cuerpo de una mujer joven en un río de Ohio. La mayor parte de la evidencia había sido borrada, pero el hijo de 6 años de la víctima, sin saberlo, les dijo a los investigadores todo lo que necesitaban saber.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres fueron asesinados mientras dormían en sus camas. La noche siguiente, un incendio provocó la destrucción de una clínica de planificación familiar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un saco de dormir desechado, que contiene zapatillas de deporte ensangrentadas y un bolso, lleva a la policía al cuerpo de una mujer joven.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1980, Shannon Mohr, residente de Michigan, murió en lo que su nuevo esposo, David Davis, reportó que fue un accidente al montar a caballo. Después de su muerte, la familia de Shannon informó que Davis parecía estar lejos de estar agobiado por el dolor.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Crimen limpio
programme.desc: Una empleada de una tintorería fue violada y asesinada en la tienda. La policía recurrió a la ciencia forense en busca de las respuestas que necesitaban.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Por lo general, es fácil determinar cómo un criminal entró en la escena del crimen. Pero en este caso, estaba lejos de esclarecerse. Parecía que el asesino se desvaneció y quizá lo hizo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer había sido agredida sexualmente, apuñalada repetidamente y dada por muerta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerto al cirujano cardíaco Darryl Sutorius en el sótano de su lujosa casa de Cincinnati, la policía asume que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Viktorioso
programme.desc: Tres homicidios en dos continentes parecían ejecuciones profesionales. Los investigadores de ambos lados del Atlántico necesitaban averiguar si estaban relacionados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el Molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.desc: Krystle reconciles with Daniel, who reveals that his break-up with her sister was amicable. Claudia moves into La Mirage. Krystle confides to Steven that Daniel is Sammy Jo's father and therefore little Danny's grandfather.

programme.desc: A hit man must beat the top assassins in the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una fría tarde de 1989, la capitana de la Marina Shirley Russel desapareció de Quantico, Virginia. La capitana Russel era una oficial dedicada; sus amigos y colegas estaban seguros de que no se había ausentado sin permiso.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se atrapa a un sospechoso que intenta huir escondiéndose en un lugar obvio. Él dispara cuando cree que su perro corre peligro. Le llaman a paramédicos para una mujer angustiada y su pareja catatónica.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer llora cuando es detenida por la policía. Durante una parada sospechosa, un pasajero nervioso ayuda a los oficiales. Un sospechoso culpa a un extraño por lo que hay en su billetera.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre al volante de un auto robado causa una loca persecución. La mamá de dos hombres llama a la policía cuando uno amenaza al otro con un cuchillo. Una pareja joven se contradice con la policía.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un adolescente huye después de ser llevado al médico. Durante una parada un sospechoso hace todo lo posible para guardar silencio. Una tía enojada no puede desalojar al sobrino y novia embarazada.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre corre y vuelve a casa a darse una ducha para que no le sigan. Un hombre agresivo viola una orden de alejamiento. Una pareja casada se contradice durante un retén.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía persigue a ladrones de autos por la ciudad y hacia los arbustos. Una amistad se acaba cuando la policía interroga. Un hombre insiste que él deja a indigentes guardar sus cosas en su auto.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer que estaba dormida recibe a los agentes con mal humor. La policía responde a informes de un sospechoso y descubre mucho más. Una joven intenta evadir la cárcel haciendo promesas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso se arriesga en un barranco cuando ya no hay salida. Una inspección de auto convierte un paseo familiar en viaje a la cárcel. La policía examina un altercado entre padre e hijo.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Botánica forense y geología: las plantas ayudan a proporcionar oxígeno y nutrientes para la existencia. El suelo es el abono de la vida. Sin embargo, ambos pueden dar pistas sobre la hora y el lugar de la muerte de una persona.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Investigación de incendios: antorchas de seguros, quemaduras de personas y asesinatos de incendios: estos crímenes están diseñados para destruir todas las pistas. Pero se puede construir un caso sólido a partir de un montón de cenizas.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Ocultar un cuerpo puede ser difícil. A veces, es más fácil esconder o disfrazar las circunstancias de la muerte, convertir el asesinato en suicidio o culpar a otra persona. La verdad sale a la luz a través de pistas sutiles tomadas de la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Una probada de veneno
programme.desc: Los envenenadores son los asesinos más astutos, ya que confían en la falta de sigilo de sus víctimas para matarlas. los asesinos inteligentes son de las criaturas más peligrosas del mundo, y por lo general, no se satisfacen solo con un homicidio.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Desde mayo hasta julio de 1984, Alton Coleman y su pareja de hecho, Denis Brown, se involucraron en una ola de asesinatos que atravesó seis estados y que dejó ocho personas muertas, entre ellos, niños.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Celebrating small but mighty animal warriors armed with sheaves of scary weapons; admiring nutrias' stink bombs; honey badgers' needlelike choppers; black-tailed gulls' razor-sharp beaks; the killer talons on dive-bombing peregrine falcons.

programme.title: World's Deadliest

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Wildebeest battle for herd hierarchy, meerkats live the thug life, floppy fish fight it out on land and locusts give up their vegetarian ways in a frenzy of cannibalism; it all happens on the wild and wide-open landscape of South Africa.

programme.title: Ghost Killers

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca remembers the first time she meets Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact
programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock defends Paul J. Bartel, a top TV producer accused of murdering the programming chief at the top-rated network, and finds the case has more twists than most Hollywood scripts.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a renowned author is murdered, Matlock defends the accused – the subject of a biography the victim was writing – only to encounter a disturbing revelation about his client midway through the trial.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: La nueva película de Reptar es decepcionante. Los bebés deberán convencer a su héroe para que mejore.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés van al cine y se sorprenden cuando Reptar pasa a ser el malo de la película. Tommy se rehúsa a creer que su héroe se ha vuelto malo y conduce a los bebés a una fantasía que entra a la película en busca de una explicación.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Dil pelean por compartir a Firulais. Por eso, los bebés buscan una nueva mascota para Dil. Además, los bebés hacen una elección en la que Tommy y Fili son candidatos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy está preocupado porque cree que se está convirtiendo en un monstruo. Susie prepara barras de cereal para los bebés, pero son horribles. Los bebés le dicen que están deliciosas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos decide que quiere ser un oficial de seguridad y controla todas las actividades de los Rugrats en el parque. Los Rugrats temen que el abuelo sea vendido en una subasta de antigüedades, e intentan salvarlo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica secuestra a Dil y lo utiliza para robar galletas, mientras que los Rugrats intentan rescatar a Dil de una vida criminal. Cuando Hugo se golpea el pulgar y se lo lleva a la boca, todos los bebés empiezan a hacer lo mismo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats creen que un montón de bebés Dil crecerán de las plantas y se preparan para la invasión. Mientras los Rugrats juegan sin darse cuenta de que Angélica llegó, ella los espía a hurtadillas, y usa a Dil para hacerles bromas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi le trae un divertido y suave juguete a Tommy llamado Goober para reemplazar a Reptar. Carlitos se encariña con Goober mientras que Tommy no. Cuando Dil destruye todos los juguetes de los Rugrats, la doctora Susie los arregla.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos moja la cama una noche, y Carlos se preocupa. Los Rugrats deciden ayudar a su amigo a despertarse seco. Los Rugrats juegan a ser exploradores, pero Dil se pierde y pasan todo su tiempo buscándolo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos rasga su camisa, y Carlos le compra una nueva, lo que lleva a Carlitos a pensar que ya no es la misma persona. Cuando Didi oculta el tarro de galletas del abuelo, Angélica convence a los bebés de que lo busquen o morirá de hambre.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos tiene una pesadilla en la cual todos se encogen de tamaño, excepto Dil, el gigante. Angélica se gradúa de la escuela de protocolo y sus nuevos modales se ponen a prueba cuando Carlota recibe a un importante huésped.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy se siente excluido cuando cada uno recibe atención, y decide intentar la técnica de Angélica de fingir estar enfermo o lastimado. Los bebés deciden formar una banda de rock, cuando Angélica les explica qué es ser famosos.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Susie entra al hospital por la extracción de sus amígdalas y sueña con regresar a casa con la ayuda de los bebés.

programme.title: Rugrats, aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que el abuelo les explica a los bebés lo que significa el día de San Valentín y Angélica le dispara a Firulais con flechas de Cupido, los bebés quieren que Fluffy sea la novia de Firulais.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: La Tía Miriam olvida traerle un regalo de su viaje a Dil, así que los niños le consiguen uno en su patio. Entran en una fantasía por la que viajan a lugares fascinantes.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy cree que el abuelo se fue por culpa de Reptar y por eso los bebés entierran todos los juguetes de Reptar. Cuando Tommy va a decírselo al abuelo, encuentra a Lou bailando salsa en una camilla de paramédicos.
