programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tara tells her sister that she's sleeping with her boyfriend and he's been paying her! Next Christina says she loves Mitchell, but he hasn't been treating her right. Then Carla's husband wanted her out of his life so he set her up with his cousin!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tony confesses to his girlfriend that he is cheating on her with a transsexual. Mary confronts her transsexual roommate Shortee. Next, Limont confronts his one-night stand.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Heaven and Justin are here today to confess their infidelity to each other…about the same woman! Next, Joan wants to know why Mistress Flame prefers her line of work!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kassi is here because she can't believe that her ex-boyfriend left her for their roommate. Then it's a sister show down when these two go head to head for the love of the same man. Plus, Bryan's girlfriend Brandy is here to tell him a secret.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kim says her husband of 7 years became possessive, lazy and demanding. She got her revenge by sleeping with his father, Daniel! Later Chris is a player who's dating 2 women at the same time and they are not happy about it!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Donna, who weighs 600 pounds, is desperate to lose weight and confronts her blind husband and angry kids about whether or not they’re responsible for her health.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Josh and Amy will find out today that their partners have been unfaithful. Next Madeline reveals to Andre that she's been sleeping with Diante. Then Quincy is engaged to Callie but she doesn't know that Quincy has been cheating with Amy.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests are here today to reveal secrets to their loved ones that may change their relationships forever.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Shell wants to come clean about her affairs with 3 separate lovers. Denise reveals that she’s cheating on her lover Becky….with a man!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Michael cheats on his wife 50+ times. Carrie confronts Nate's ex to end her interference.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Destiny is accused of being a pathological liar and faking her own pregnancy and miscarriage with her once boyfriend.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Joshua suspects the mother of his 2 sons, Ricketta, of cheating and has paternity doubts. Ricketta denies Joshua's suspicions and is ready to prove it! Then, is Michael Leanna's child's father? Is Corey Jonetta's baby's father or not

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lisa has had all six of her children REMOVED from her home as a result of neglect and abuse which she still tries to justify.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Buddy pasa sus días fumando y jugando a los videojuegos, en lugar de mantener a su familia. Su novia Holly trabaja para mantenerlos a todos, incluyendo a su hijo que tiene necesidades especiales, ¡pero está harta!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: LaShawna y su novio James sabrán si su amiga Coral lastimó a su hijo hace años. También admitirá que ella le fue infiel con Coral. ¿Cómo reaccionará él cuando descubra otro bombazo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desde que Chris tenía 3 meses, su abuela Anne lo crió y le dijo que su madre Hollie era abusiva y que trató de lastimarlo. Ahora Chris y Hollie se van a conocer por primera vez en nuestro escenario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lanikka está harta de los abusos de su novio Malcom. Después, los celos de Tim han destrozado su familia, pero ahora está desesperado por recuperarlos, ¿Tiffany lo dejará definitivamente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jennifer se fue de casa para protegerse de su padrastro Allen. 15 años después, su madre quiere una segunda oportunidad, pero Jennifer tiene dudas. ¿Puede Steve ayudar a componer esta familia destruida?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Naomi, de 17 años, ha cambiado repentinamente de actitud y tiene la misión de ser madre. Sus padres, Leeanders y April, necesitan que Steve intervenga.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Tras sobrevivir a una loca persecución en coche, perder la pierna y estar en coma a causa de su esposo, Portia finalmente lo confrontará. No admitirá la culpa, pero hoy Steve está ayudando a Portia a hacerse oír.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Pamela quiere pesar 40 libras. Samantha, que sufre de bulimia y alcoholismo, roba para consumir sus atracones. ¿Pueden las dos mujeres lidiar con sus desórdenes alimenticios con apoyo y tratamiento?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Rebecca dejó a su bebé con su prometido James y su madre Adeline, y descubrió que su bebé estaba hospitalizado. Rebecca sospecha que James es el responsable. ¡Adeline la culpa de la muerte del bebé!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Justin está convencido de que su novia Lainie le ha sido infiel, y lo que es más importante, que no es el padre de su hijo. Pero sus propias inseguridades lo han vuelto violento. Además, Steven duda ser padre del hijo de Ashley.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Korey está seguro de que su novia Dominique le es infiel y también le preocupa que pueda estar prostituyéndose. Dice que las sospechas han hecho que se vuelva violento. Después, Gregory cree que su novia Robin no le es fiel.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Dennis afirma que su ex-novia Kendal lo mantiene amarrado con mentiras sobre su embarazo. ¡Quiere saber si es el padre de su hija! ¿Finalmente los resultados de la prueba de ADN de Steve les permitirán seguir adelante?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La adolescente Megan vive con su antiguo novio controlador Rick. Megan no puede ir a la escuela, buscar trabajo, ni comer sin su permiso. ¿Pueden su tía y Steve lograr hacerla entender?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jack está preocupado por sus nietos porque su nuera Carol ha sido negligente y tiene mal genio. Después, Kendra explica por qué de repente dio el bebé de Corey en adopción.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the marines prepare for Ace's execution, Luffy looks back on all the good times he shared with his brother, and Jimbei reveals the shocking details of the day Fire Fist Ace went down in defeat!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang continue on their way to Marineford, but once he arrives, the rubber-man must defeat both Navy Admirals and Warlords of the Sea before he can save Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Citizens and soldiers alike prepare for all-out war as Ace is led to the site of his execution. While the world watches, the true identity of the condemned man's father is shockingly revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Flashbacks reveal the agonizing sacrifice made by Ace's mother in order save his life – and the secret behind his connection to Luffy. Back in the present, Whitebeard makes an unexpected entrance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As a massive seaquake rocks Marineford, Ace recalls the ups and downs of his life as a pirate, including his first encounter with Whitebeard – and the unthinkable betrayal that led to his capture!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard begins his attack with a tsunami-spawning sea quake, but the marines counter with a blast of frigid air that turns the tidal wave into an iceberg! Will Luffy and his crew arrive in time to join the battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fire meets ice as mythical warriors, erupting admirals, legendary pirates, and a giant giant go head to head in the biggest, baddest battle of all time! There's only one thing missing: Monkey D. Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A towering giant of a giant known as Little Oars Jr. carves a path of death and destruction as he fights to save Ace. The monstrous mauler is within arm's reach of his friend when he's intercepted by the seven warlords of the sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the wake of Little Oars Junior's tragic defeat, Admiral Sengoku hatches a devious plan to speed up the countdown to Ace's execution. The situation looks beyond bleak until a hero enters the fray from on high!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy appears on the field of battle with a ferocious sense of urgency. Ace could be executed at any minute, and the rubber-man's refusal to back down impresses even the most feared men in all the world!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy leaps into action, attacking the Naval forces with a frantic display of brutality. Meanwhile, Ace watches in horror as an army of zombies rises up to attack his brother!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Supernatural powers take center stage in the battle to save Ace as Luffy and his uniquely talented allies throw down with the Navy's own arsenal of Devil Fruit Eaters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A gift from Boa Hancock and Ivan-san's Galaxy Wink get Luffy closer to Ace than ever, but a sword-wielding foe from the past threatens to derail the rescue mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs into a lethal roadblock in the form of Hawk-Eye Mihawk. The legendary swordsman is determined to halt Luffy's onslaught, but Ivan-san, Boa Hancock, and Jimbei aren't ready to give up the fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his pirate brethren have their hands full with an ominous army of unbeatable Kumas! While the inhuman minions march onward, Whitebeard encounters a former ally!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard is betrayed – and brutally stabbed – by one of his own men! In the wake of this unthinkable act of treason, allegations about the legendary pirate bring the battle to a halt!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard shrugs off his injuries and leads a ferocious charge into the heart of the enemy's defenses, but three deadly Admirals join forces to silence his shock wave attack as the pirates find themselves surrounded by impenetrable walls!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the ice melting beneath his feet, Luffy begins a desperate final charge towards his soon-to-be-executed brother. Should his rescue attempt fail, death will surely embrace them both!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile's unexpected assistance creates an opening for Luffy to advance, and Whitebeard has a surprise lurking beneath the ice that might swing the momentum in favor of the pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle rages on and the bodies pile up as Whitebeard squares off against an Admiral, Luffy gets knocked cold, and the legendary Vice-Admiral Garp finally enters the fray!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While awaiting his execution, Ace flashes back to a troubled youth seeking the truth about his father. Meanwhile, Luffy begs Ivan for a potentially-deadly treatment that will allow him to continue fighting!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard struggles to withstand the full force of the Marine onslaught. With the executioner's swords hovering above Ace's head, Straw Hat Luffy discovers a new ability!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard orders his men to help Luffy clear a path to the execution scaffold, but someone close to the Rubber-man rises to derail the rescue mission at the last second!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must defeat the man who taught him how to fight – his own grandfather – in order to save Ace. Battling his own flesh and blood won't be easy, but a waxy ally is there to provide backup!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is finally free from the execution scaffold! Luffy and his brother make a fearsome team as they blaze a path toward salvation. Ravaged by the war, Whitebeard wistfully commands his men to make the journey to the New World without him!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite Whitebeard's order to retreat, Ace is drawn back to the battlefield by the cruel taunts of a Marine adversary. Luffy watches in horror as his brother makes what could be his last stand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An eerie silence falls over the battlefield as Luffy and Ace share a heartbreaking final moment together. With his dying breath, Ace begs his brother to convey a message to his fellow pirates.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash battles someone all too familiar, and later hears a message from the Necronomicon. Meanwhile, the deadliest Deadite attacks.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A superhero is trapped by Magnus, and his lack of finesse affects the team's work. Elsewhere, Will and Declan go on the search for a creature that's loose in the city, after the discovery of an eggshell.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A confused Dr. Magnus finds the Sanctuary and the surrounding city has been destroyed, but she has no idea how it happened.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Henry tries to determine why a seemingly docile domesticated abnormal suddenly turned violent after it attacks a research scientist.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will tries to defend Magnus from the heads of the Sanctuary Network when they accuse her of committing a shocking murder.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandoval (Von Flores) agrees to testify against the Taelons in return for immunity.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) suspect Zo'or (Anita La Selva) of orchestrating a series of murders.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) is torn between love and duty when her boyfriend (Cameron Daddo) is captured by the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelons' impending death stasis sparks a battle of wills between Da'an (Leni Parker) and Zo'or (Anita La Selva).

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Jaridian energy beam turns a team of Companion protectors into assassins.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr crash lands the Eureka Maru on a Nietzschean planet and develops amnesia. He must remember what he is doing before the Nietzscheans discover him and his crate of stolen goods.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper receives the "gift" of knowledge from a dying Perseid, only to discover that the Perseid was being hunted by a bounty hunter, who has now turned his attention to Harper.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is arrested for assassinating a dictator 300 years ago, by the man he helped install in his place. The new dictator ended up being much, much worse.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda is boarded by a drone from the Consensus of Parts, a mythical mechanical society. While friendly at first, the drone tries to force the ship to join the Consensus.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found dead in a hotel stairwell and detectives quickly uncover that she had a secret life that may have led to her demise.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a police officer goes missing, it becomes apparent he is the victim of a jealous wrath.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Three members of a wealthy family are gunned down in their own home; with little evidence to go on, investigators embark on a multi-year surveillance operation to see if they can prove their instincts are correct.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A beloved entrepreneur is murdered in his office; a secret double life is quickly revealed, and despite mountains of suspicion, lies and motives, his killer is not who one would assume.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A man is found dead in the shower, and police have only two suspects, but to figure out who killed him and why, is not as cut and dry as it may seem.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found beaten to death at the neighborhood pool, launching her father on a mission to catch her killer that ultimately changes crime fighting forever.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A brutal attack leaves witness to a murder; but when the police find the killer, it turns out the intended victim, and the motive, were not what anyone imagined.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a prominent attorney is found savagely stabbed to death in her office, investigators find themselves with a long list of suspects from violent felons to lesbian love triangles; in the end, they find a killer as cold as they come.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What originally looks like a heart attack turns out to be a calculated execution; soon, detectives unravel a murder plot that hits a little too close to home.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: After a woman is found shot dead, with her 9-month-old daughter in the next room, detectives uncover a web of late-night encounters, secret lovers and seething jealousy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A woman is found stabbed to death in her apartment; with a long list of admirers, investigators uncover secret obsessions leading to a sadistic killer suspected by no one.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is strangled to death in the middle of a Hawaiian paradise; investigators quickly focus in on two suspects, but nothing comes easy as they spend more than a decade striving to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason, helping a citizen's committee fight a proposed construction project, finds himself more deeply involved when bribery, political blackmail, and murder develop.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Vindictive Laura Randall is slain after she plots to blow up her husband's unique underwater technology.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Jimmie's Last Stand

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Paintball Cajun Style

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Mumbo Gumbo
programme.desc: A famous canon rolls into the shop, and an old friend causes some Cajun confusion trying to pawn an old family gumbo recipe.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Horseplay
programme.desc: Tammie and Johnnie try to lasso a deal on an antique toy horse, and a customer walks in with a very rare weapon.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Really Gotta Go Kart
programme.desc: The guys check out an old go-kart that, with the help of Yankee's restoration powers, has the potential to become something extraordinary.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While Mike and Frank pick the back roads of Minnesota, they challenge Danielle to sell a ten-foot fiberglass cowboy boot that's been gathering dust for over a year.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Danielle turns up a good lead she's been working on for months. When Mike tells Frank let's pack up for a trip to South Dakota, Frank says he can't.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With a Noah's ark of exotic animals, the guys visit a Maine taxidermist where Mike gambles big money on a huge elephant head. Danielle's search for a pachyderm-loving buyer leads to a wheelin' and dealin' rock'n'roll legend.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Tricky Dick's Tennessee yard is littered with treasures, and though he isn't motivated to part with any of it, Mike goes hog-wild for a vintage pig ride that could be worth some serious coin.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Since opening his second store, Mike's feeling serious pressure to fill up the van. He gets lucky while freestyling in Virginia with Danielle. A cold call with Gary pays off with a pink jukebox and the remains of a rare 1930s motorbike.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank goes wild in Joe's garage. It's packed with vintage motorcycles and while Frank scores deal after deal, Mike's efforts sputter and stall. With his family hit hard by the recession, a prolific collector is eager to sell.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are ready for Halloween when a 19th century vampire killing kit stakes out the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Come party with the Pawn Stars as they prepare the ultimate gift for the Old Man's 70th birthday, a fully rebuilt 1957 Chevy 150.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick considers buying an 18th Century cannon that could be worth up to $40,000.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: An 1861 Civil War saber finds its way into the shop--but if it's real, why was the blade never sharpened? Then Rick and the owner of a Chuck Berry autographed Fender guitar find themselves on different pages.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Corey gets into deep water with his dad and "The Old Man" when he buys a 1984 Chris Craft boat without first testing it out. Will he bounce back and make a profit or see his investment sink?

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: All Jazzed Up

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Seat of Horns

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Gone with the Pawn

programme.desc: Japan, 1987. Jotaro Kujo, a descendant of the Joestar family, is in prison and claims he is being possessed by an evil spirit. His grandfather, Joseph Joestar, immediately departs for Japan, where he must reveal the family's terrible secret.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Who Will Be the Judge!?
programme.desc: Jotaro returns to his normal life while keeping his "Stand" power a secret. But on the way to school one day he meets a new transfer student named Noriaki Kakyoin and sustains a strange injury.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Curse of DIO
programme.desc: Jotaro defeats Kakyoin with his Stand power, but as he attempts to glean information from his adversary about DIO, Joseph notices a sinister connection.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Tower of Grey
programme.desc: The Joestars must defeat DIO within 50 days or Holly's life is forfeit. With no time to lose, they head for Egypt where DIO is thought to be hiding but end up encountering a new threat along the way.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Silver Chariot
programme.desc: Jotaro and his comrades are attacked by Polnareff, an assassin with a Stand called "Silver Chariot" that is capable of lightning-fast swordplay. It falls to Avdol to face down the threat using "Magician's Red."

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Dark Blue Moon
programme.desc: Jotaro welcomes a new member to the team and the group leaves for Singapore by ship. Along the way, a young stowaway is found and Jotaro comes under attack, but is the child the source of this latest evil?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci asks Taylor to have a talk with Bentley about respecting girls, Catelynn meets with an organic baby food company in New York, and Cheyenne is anxious about Cory's return.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne helps Cory and Taylor plan their gender-reveal party, Mackenzie works to be more organized for her kids, and Amber introduces Dimitri to her protective brother.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Mackenzie and her family help each other heal, Cheyenne worries about how Ryder will adjust to having a half-sister, and Catelynn and Tyler look into gender selection.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber is shocked when Gary asks her to move onto his property. Catelynn pursues a career in microblading while Mackenzie accepts a job opportunity in Florida. Bentley starts therapy and Maci is heartbroken when she finds out he feels neglected.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber deals with online trolls who criticize her weight while Catelynn receives her microblading certification and looks into opening her own studio. To raise awareness during PCOS month, Maci accepts a challenge from Taylor.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: After discovering that a staff member at Nova's old daycare is a sex offender, Catelynn and Tyler decide to talk to Nova about protecting herself. Mackenzie struggles starting her new job in Florida and taking care of the kids without Josh.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Zach's families pressure them to get married while Mackenzie and Josh give their marriage another chance in Florida. For the first time ever, Catelynn and Tyler decide to vote in the Presidential Election.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Pedro sufre la soledad de perder a Julieta y prefiere dejar que salga de su vida para que ella aclare sus sentimientos. Gaspar recibe un sí de Guadalupe para hacer realidad el sueño de casarse con ella. José decide darle el apellido a Simón.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La verdad del atentado de José se revela y, cuando se descubre que fue Efraín quien lo mandó a golpear, la policía lo detiene. José le exige a Beatriz declarar lo que sabe. La familia de Guadalupe rechaza el anuncio de su matrimonio con Gaspar.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta pierde los límites y planea su venganza contra Paula en un juego que puede salirle muy caro. Beatriz le exige a Sofía pagar la fianza de Efraín y Amador o la delatará por su crimen. Don Emilio recibe ayuda de unos nobles campesinos.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José le rompe el corazón a Paula cuando le revela las mentiras de Sofía sobre su padre. Ella decide escapar a la capital para refugiarse de su realidad en casa de Adela. Modesto sale de la hacienda para un encuentro que causará sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro empieza a ganar terreno con David. Antonia convence a su hijo mayor de quedarse en San Pedro, se muestra arrepentida y anuncia en las fiestas patronales la futura boda, dejando boquiabiertos a todos. Fernando es internado por su adicción.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La señora Guerra seduce a David con regalos caros, lo que despierta la envidia en otros niños. David huye y corre peligro. Alejandro lo rescata, pero la minera enfurecida amenaza a los hombres del pueblo, que instigan en sus hijos el odio hacia ella.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La noticia del compromiso de Alejandro y Gabriela llega hasta Fernando. Él escapa del centro de rehabilitación, enfrenta a su hermano y le confiesa que David es su hijo. Inocencia muere en brazos de Gastón, sin poder decir el nombre de su agresor.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Al saber quién es el violador de Gabriela, Alejandro le da una paliza a su hermano. Antonia encubre a Fernando y niega que él sea un violador. La prueba de ADN confirma que David es hijo de Fernando. Antonia lo celebra y usa a Irene contra Gabriela.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara y Norma se enfrentan a balazos con los pistoleros que acorralan a Juan, la policía encuentra algunas pistas. Fernando comienza a manipular en contra de sus hijas a una sumisa Gabriela.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela y Fernando llegan de la luna de miel cuando Pepa le prepara una divertida bienvenida a Jimena, Fernando anuncia nuevas reglas. La policía captura a varios sospechosos de los atentados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo les explican a los Reyes que se quedan en la hacienda ante el peligro que se cierne sobre Gabriela. Fernando contrata como mayordomos a dos antiguos enemigos de los Reyes.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Leonidas vuelve a ofender a Ruth y Juan la defiende, pero Óscar impide que su hermano lo golpee porque es el médico que atendió a Jimena, Leonidas pide perdón, Eva encara a Raquel sobre Ruth.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Seoul, South Korea to clinch a spot in the finale and a chance to race for the one million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the one million dollar prize on the line, the final three teams race to Chicago where they must complete their final challenges within the city's most iconic landmarks, including a trip to Wrigley Field, the home of the World Champion Chicago Cubs.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: 11 of the most competitive teams in Amazing Race history take on the ultimate challenge for a shot at a Million Dollars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers Dangle from amazing heights to retrieve their first clue in Antwerp Belgium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Things get slimy at a fishy challenge in Tangiers. Morocco.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: How will a pair of Indy Car racers handle a self-drive in Saint-Tropez, France?

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The stakes are high as teams face the Double U-Turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers swap teammates for an entire leg for the first time ever in Amazing Race history!

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Will one team's game be on the line when they misplace their passport?

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Things get hairy for teams in Hong Kong when tasked with wrangling fifty hairy crabs in the pouring rain.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes his son Opie and several of his pals on a camping trip. Barney and Gomer tag along to help out but only succeed in getting themselves lost in the woods.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer Pyle decides to join the Marine Corps and immediately falls afoul of his drill instructor Sergeant Carter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie Taylor develops a crush on his teacher, who also happens to be his father's girlfriend.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A campaign to fatten and stretch Barney Fife gets underway when it becomes apparent he doesn't match up to Civil Service physical requirements.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invites relatives to Mayberry for a visit but they quickly wear out their welcome.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass (Howard Morris) goes back to school when his girl demands it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has his misgivings when Aunt Bee's old beau shows up in Mayberry and tries to win her over again.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife buys a bloodhound to aid in Mayberry law enforcement.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Thelma Lou have a lovers' quarrel. Andy tries to help but only succeeds in getting caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney starts wearing his uniform all the time after being threatened with bodily harm if he's ever caught without it on.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie almost becomes $50 richer after finding a change purse.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy goes to Raleigh for a job interview and chaos prevails in Mayberry with Barney Fife as acting sheriff.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Aunt Bee snags the starring role in the Mayberry Centennial Pageant, Andy and Opie become neglected at home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie's an unwilling participant when he's betrothed to marry a mountain family's daughter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Helen are supposed to have a day off but are continually interrupted at their secluded picnic spot by Barney Fife asking questions about his duties.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife demonstrates gypsy fortune telling to Opie and then Opie's wishes seem to begin to come true.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis slips and falls in jail and is convinced by a lawyer that he should sue the county.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife decides to dabble in real estate as a side job. He tries to get the sheriff to put his house up for sale.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober dismantles a car in the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis (Hal Smith) rides into Mayberry on a cow under the impression it is a horse.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife believes he's hexed when several accidents happen after he fails to continue a lucky chain letter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney think they'll have some privacy with their girlfriends after Goober finds a girl of his own. But they discover Goober favors triple dates.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney runs for sheriff when Andy seems lined up for another job. Andy's job falls through and he becomes a write-in candidate for re-election.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney finds $250,000 in cash from a bank robbery and decides to capture the robber himself.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's reputation brings a proposal from a Hollywood writer that he star in a television series as a sheriff without a gun.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's girlfriend becomes jealous when a pretty friend of the family stays at the Taylor home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney divides Mayberry into two hostile camps when he finds that an old assault case was never resolved.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' gentle brush strokes create bending palm trees on the edge of a sea coast, just before the water reaches its high point.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: So quickly, Bob Ross paints this beautiful and peaceful mountain valley - so many layers and layers on the canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even a cold, frozen snowy afternoon can be displayed with signs of astonishing beauty, as portrayed by Bob Ross in this lovely yet simple scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross invites you along to enjoy a fabulous mountain lake view with layers of soft hills and trees shrouded in heavy clouded haze.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Find yourself in a place just like this on a warm summer day - Bob Ross creates clear sky and shade trees by a nice swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' exciting use of blue, yellow and orange hues brings vibrancy to this wood side setting and dream cabin beside a clear blue lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A lake and some tall trees pay homage to a commanding mountain in the background, as a cabin stands nearby -- a classic Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest painter Steve Ross uses lots of color in this stirring depiction of giant peaks behind foothills opening onto a smooth lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross allows the greenery of a deep grove to be barely visible in the light of early morning - all tucked inside an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross captures a real 'dreamscape' on canvas -- soft rolling hills, birch trees and pretty lake; paint along and add your own touches.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Here it is! Impressive skies, misty waters, and snowy mountains - completed by Bob Ross using just his specially designed painting knife!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a moment in time as the sea finds itself in one of nature's sudden cloudbursts; experience another oval masterpiece!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: New enemies disregard rules and morals; although Rick wants to find a peaceful agreement, the enemies seem to prefer a more violent resolution.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After facing all of the recent trials, a slight detour may offer the solution that the group has been seeking.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Tyreese llegan a las inmediaciones de Terminus y descubren que sus amigos están retenidos y van a ser sacrificados para ser comidos. Ahora, el destino de todo el grupo depende de ellos dos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick vaga por el bosque y encuentra a Gabriel, un párroco al que salvan de una horda de zombis y les permite pernoctar en su iglesia. Sin embargo, hay algo extraño en él y esa misma noche uno de los integrantes del grupo es secuestrado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Gareth y su grupo de caníbales atacan la iglesia mientras Rick y sus compañeros están en el bosque buscándolos para vengar a Bob. Además, el padre Gabriel confiesa el siniestro acto de su pasado que no deja descansar a su conciencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beth se despierta en un hospital de Atlanta, pero pronto se da cuenta de que los mismos que la auxiliaron y sanaron no la dejarán marchar. No obstante, su nuevo amigo, Noah, y ella tratan de huir del recinto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras se dirigen hacia el norte, el grupo se ve obligado a detenerse porque una horda de zombis bloquea el camino. La tensión aumenta y la situación termina por estallar cuando Eugene confiesa un secreto que había ocultado a todos hasta ahora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Daryl persiguen a los captores de Beth por una Atlanta devastada, pero su auto se queda sin gasolina y deben pasar la noche en un refugio para mujeres.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Noah regresan a la iglesia para pedirles ayuda a sus compañeros. Rick y otros integrantes del grupo van a Atlanta con la intención de secuestrar a varios policías para intercambiarlos por Beth y Carol.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick busca una salida pacífica al conflicto, pero sus enemigos la rechazan y prefieren zanjar las cosas de forma violenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Para cumplir con la promesa que Beth le hizo Noah antes de morir, el grupo se dirige al barrio de Noah, esperando hallar allí protección y a otros supervivientes. Sin embargo, Rick y los suyos no quieren hacerse demasiadas esperanzas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El vehículo se avería y el grupo continúa a pie hacia Washington D. C., pero les sorprende una tormenta y buscan cobijo en un granero, donde encuentran algo totalmente inesperado e inquietante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron invita al grupo a Alexandria, su comunidad, un lugar que, según él, es seguro y amigable. Rick, incapaz de olvidar Woodbury y Terminus, desconfía de Aaron, pero Michonne quiere darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los integrantes del grupo tienen entrevistas con Deanna, la jefa de Alexandria, y esperan en las casas que les asignan a saber si son aceptados o rechazados. Cuando conocen a los habitantes de la comunidad, perciben que no están bien entrenados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Daryl y Carol se reúnen en secreto para planear cómo recuperar sus armas del arsenal de Alexandria, ya que temen que, si algo sale mal, van a necesitarlas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol le sugiere a Rick que deben asesinar a Pete porque es violento con su esposa e hijo. Por otra parte, Gabriel advierte a Deanna que desconfíe del grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard Trethewey helps a homeowner repair her faulty shower valve which has been installed backwards. Tom Silva helps a homeowner rebuild her wobbly stair banister.

programme.desc: Richard Trethewey helps a homeowner replace a corroded fitting on his water heater. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Tom helps a homeowner install a vented range hood in her kitchen.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: This Old House

programme.desc: Roof framing begins in Lexington with Tom and Kevin. They build a new farmer's porch reminiscent of Colonial-style homes, as well as a structural ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin meets electricians to see a rough electrical inspection, and Tom installs a hybrid railing system. The homeowner designs a new family kitchen.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Tom reinforce the porch and review ways to meet the insulation value needed in the walls. Richard meets a plumber for info on inspections, and Kevin sees the new storm window system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin sees the installation of a new gutter and how Roger is restoring a patch of lawn to nature. An electrician updates the wiring while Norm visits a window factory in New Hampshire.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A contractor installs a new floor tile while an electrician shows Kevin how to wire an electrical box. Kevin patches the walls. Tom squares an arched doorway.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin finds the second floor sanded, stained, and sealed as Tom oversees the first floor. Norm sees custom refrigerator panels. Kevin meets the designer of an inn. Norm makes a sink base.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger starts the front walk while a contractor installs porcelain in the screen porch. Richard sees the sink set. Roger visits a salvage yard to see granite for the front walk.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: LED strips are installed in the kitchen. Richard reviews the need for insulation, and wallpaper is put up in the girl’s rooms. Kevin finds a painter painting decorative stripes on a wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger places new plants while Richard installs two types of radiators to heat the garage and sitting room. A chandelier and garage door is fitted.

programme.desc: Scott replaces outdated fluorescent undercabinet lights. Roger and Kevin demonstrate how to work with concrete. Richard teaches Tom about energy savings of temperature setbacks on thermostats.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger educates Kevin on beneficial insects. Tom resizes a front door that gets stuck on the carpet every time it opens. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard repairs an outdoor garden faucet.

programme.desc: Roger learns from a beekeeper how to set up a beehive for a homeowner. The guys ask, "What is it?" and Scott adds lighting to a dark kitchen without having to run any new wiring.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls fake a contest to give Jack the rent money he needs for Jack's Bistro. Their good deed turns to disaster when Jack spends the money on a leather coat.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: In order to convince their landlord, Mr. Roper, that there is nothing going on between them and their new male roommate, Chrissy and Janet tell him that Jack is gay.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's visiting mother, not knowing that the girls have rented the spare room to Jack, causes havoc when she decides to spend the night with them.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper feels convinced that his niece will be safe going out with Jack, and Jack would rather be with Janet and Chrissy celebrating Janet's birthday, until he sees the niece.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's fast-talking friend, Larry, gives Jack and the girls a puppy and the kids go to all lengths keeping this from Roper who forbids animals in his building.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ivan Robinson
programme.desc: On May 28th, 2005 Julio Cesar Chavez and Ivan Robinson faced eachother at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in an unamimous decision victory for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ken Sigurani
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1998 Julio Cesar Chavez faced Ken Sigurani at the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket resulting in a technical knock out win for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Scott Walker
programme.desc: On February 9th, 1996 Julio Cesar Chavez and Scott Walker faced each other in a 10 round bout at the Cesars Palace Sports Pavilion in Las Vegas that ended in the second round by technical knockout for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Kelly Pavlik vs Jermain Taylor 2
programme.desc: On February 16th, 2008 Kelly Pavlik faced Jermain Taylor for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas the 12 round bout resulted in a unanimous decision win for Pavlik.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Esteban Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 30th, 2022, Keyshawn Davis fought Esteban Sanchez in a lightweight bout at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Delivering a sixth round TKO, Davis showed his speed and agility and that he'll have a promising future in the lightweight division.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Jose Zaragoza
programme.desc: On December 11th, 2021, Keyshawn Davis and Jose Zaragoza fought at Madison Square Garden in New York resulting in Zaragoza going down twice in round two giving the victory to Keyshawn Davis.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Omar Tienda Bahena
programme.desc: On September 23rd, 2022 Keyshawn Davis fought Omar Tienda Bahena at the Prudential Center in Newark, NJ with Bahena going down in round 5 that solidfied Davis' win by technical knockout.

programme.title: Manny Pacquaio vs Timothy Bradley II
programme.desc: On April 12th, 2014 Manny Pacquiao faced Timothy Bradley for the second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO World Welterweight title in a 12 round bout resulting in a victory for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Chris Algieri
programme.desc: On November 23rd, 2014, Manny Pacquiao and Chris Algieri faced each other for the WBO Welterweight Title in Macao. Manny Pacquaio defeated Chris Algieri after knocking Algieri down six times and securing a unanimous decision.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 1
programme.desc: Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought their first match in 2004, resulting in a controversial draw. Both fighters displayed incredible skill, but no clear winner emerged setting the stage for their epic rivarly.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 2
programme.desc: On March 15th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao faced Juan Manuel Marquez the second time at Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super feather weight titles with Marquez going down in round 3 Pacquiaos win was secured by split decision.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 3
programme.desc: On November 12th, 2011 Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought for the third time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBO World Welterweight titles ending in a victory for Pacquiao in this 12 round bout.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 4
programme.desc: On December 8th, 2012, Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought for their fourth and final fight. The bout ended in a stunning knockout victory for Marquez, solidifying their rivalry as one of the most memorable in boxing history.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2009, Manny Pacquiao fought Miguel Cotto for the WBO and WBC Diamond Welterweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Pacquiao put on a dominant performance, forcing the ref to stop the fight in round 12.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Oscar De La Hoya

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn throws herself a 34th birthday party, which well-meaning Royce nearly tanks with a surprise dance routine. Jen struggles with the idea of sticking it out in her troubled marriage to Eric Williams. Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: Evelyn and Jen leave Miami to visit basketball fiancée Gloria Govan and Matt Barnes. Also, the girls go to a bust of a party that gets worse when they bump into an alleged groupie that may have been talking to Jen's husband. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Emotions get heated when Gloria defends her sister's role in an alleged scandal involving Shaunie. Suzie, Jen, and Royce make a splash when a second run-in with an alleged groupie turns into a fight on the streets of upscale Miami! Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: Malaysia refuses to stand for Jackie's underhanded comments and kicks her out of her party. Shaunie invites the girls to her son's clothing line launch and hopes to bring some resolve to the group now that Draya is gone. Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: Angel attempts to defend her character but is quickly put in the hot seat when Malaysia and Mehgan come for her. Jackie and Malaysia grow sick of their differences and try to use this vacation to finally mend fences. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!
